The scope of work consists of an interior tenant renovation within existing Suites 1320 and 1360 on the 13th floor of an existing high-rise office building at 500 North Broadway, St.?Louis, Missouri. Work includes selective interior demolition; construction of new and modified non-load-bearing partitions, interior glazing, and doors; reconfiguration and renovation of private offices, open office areas, conference and huddle rooms, IT and copy rooms, lunchroom/pantry, and a wellness restroom; installation of new finishes, casework, and countertops; and associated modifications to existing mechanical, electrical, plumbing, fire protection, fire alarm, lighting, ceiling, and data systems to support the new layout. Work also includes accessibility upgrades within the tenant area as shown. There is no change in occupancy classification, construction type, or means of egress, and all work will be fully sprinklered and performed in accordance with the 2021 IBC, applicable energy and accessibility codes, and City of St.?Louis ordinances.
Relocation of existing fire alarm devices and adding new notification devices

Refresh upstairs bathroom. Replace toilet and sink with new fixtures. Remove old tile floor and replace with new tile. Reglaze existing bathtub. Build a hollow partition to enclose existing plumbing for bathtub/shower that is currently visible, because bathtub is currently open on two sides. This wall will be six feet high and will allow us to enclose the bathtub with three walls, and have the three walls tiled. We will use traditional shower rod on the fourth wall. We will move a light switch that is currently inside the bathroom to the outside hall just outside the door. We will not be opening any walls or moving any walls...original footprint of the room will remain the same. No plumbing will be moved. The bathtub will be reglazed onsite and will NOT be removed or relocated.
